name: GetTorus
summary: Class provides user interface to define a torus.

constructors.name: GetTorus
constructors.summary: Initializes a new instance of the GetTorus class

methods.name: Dispose()
methods.summary: Actively reclaims unmanaged resources that this instance uses.

methods.name: Dispose(Boolean)
methods.summary: For derived class implementers. This method is called with argument true when class user calls Dispose(), while with argument false when the Garbage Collector invokes the finalizer, or Finalize() method.You must reclaim all used unmanaged resources in both cases, and can use this chance to call Dispose on disposable fields if the argument is true.Also, you must call the base virtual method within your overriding method.

params.name: disposing
params.doc: true if the call comes from the Dispose() method; false if it comes from the Garbage Collector finalizer.

methods.name: Finalize
methods.summary: Passively reclaims unmanaged resources when the class user did not explicitly call Dispose().

methods.name: Get
methods.summary: Prompt for the getting of a torus.

params.name: torus
params.doc: The torus geometry defined by the user.

returns.doc: The result of the getting operation.

methods.name: GetMesh
methods.signature: public Result GetMesh(ref int verticalFaces, ref int aroundFaces, out Torus torus)
methods.summary: Prompt for the getting of a mesh torus.

params.name: verticalFaces
params.doc: The number of faces in the vertical direction.

params.name: aroundFaces
params.doc: The number of faces in the around direction

params.name: torus
params.doc: The torus geometry defined by the user.

returns.doc: The result of the getting operation.

properties.name: AroundDirectionCount
properties.summary: The number of faces in the around direction.

properties.name: AroundDirectionMinimumCount
properties.summary: The minimum number of faces in the around direction.

properties.name: DefaultSize
properties.summary: Default radius or diameter (based on InDiameterMode)

properties.name: FixInnerRadius
properties.summary: Second radius option. The first radius chosen sets the inner dimension of the torus and the second radius is constrained to be outside of the first radius.

properties.name: InDiameterMode
properties.summary: Determines if the "size" value is representing a radius or diameter

properties.name: InSecondDiameterMode
properties.summary: Second radius option. Determines if the second "size" value is representing a radius or diameter

properties.name: PromptForMeshDensity
properties.summary: Set true if you are prompting for a mesh or subd torus.

properties.name: SecondSize
properties.summary: Second radius or diameter (based on InSecondDiameterMode)

properties.name: VerticalDirectionCount
properties.summary: The number of faces in the vertical direction.

properties.name: VerticalDirectionMinimumCount
properties.summary: The minimum number of faces in the vertical direction.
